rulings.Case Title: JOHN WONG VS. NICK LANHAM et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Wednesday, April 22, 2015. Line 1. DEFENDANT NICK LANHAM, ED KOSTER, and JENNIFER KOMM's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend as to First and Second Causes of Action and SUSTAINED without leave to amend as to Third Cause of Action. Plaintiff failed to plead sufficient facts to support the delayed discovery of the causes of action. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KATY CHMURA VS. LAWRENCE CHOY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Wednesday, April 22, 2015. Line 2. DEFENDANT CHRISTINA SUTTON's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend. Plaintiff failed to plead sufficient facts to show that Defendant Sutton owed a duty to P or that she had authority to perform the necessary maintenance on the subject property. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MICHIKO MORI VS. RUBY K JOE

rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Wednesday, April 22, 2015. Line 3. CROSS DEFENDANTS HO, ARWIN FUYU D/B/A NEW ERA CONSTRUCTION, HO, JIMMY AKA JIMMY WU D/B/A NEW ERA CONSTRUCTION, NEW ERA CONSTRUCTION LLC's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-14-542112 WITH CASE CGC-14-541947 GRANTED per stipulation. rulings.Case Title: ALEXIOS DIMITRIOU VS. ANDREW DIMITRIOU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Default
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Wednesday, April 22, 2015. Line 4. DEFENDANT ANDREW DIMITRIOU Motion To Vacate Default. CONTINUED to May 14, 2015. Opposing party failed to provide the Court with courtesy copies of the motion. (See SF Local Rule 2.6B.) Courtesy copies must be dropped off in Dept. 501 by 4 p.m. on May 1, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date.=(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NORMA YEE VS. KHEVAN LENNOL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Discovery And Awarding Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Wednesday, April 22, 2015. Line 8. DEFENDANT DEBORAH ROGERS Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Discovery And Awarding Sanctions GRANTED subject to opposition. Defendant failed to provide timely responses to requested discovery. (See Code Civ. Pro., §§ 2030.290, 2031.320.) Defendant is to pay sanctions in the amount of $600. =(501/REQ)
